name: Salesforce
one_line: Enterprise cloud CRM and sales platform with a large API ecosystem.
self_serve_detail: Sign up for a free Salesforce Developer Edition org; create an External Client App (or connected app) in Setup to obtain a consumer key/secret and OAuth scopes. No paid plan or human approval is required to get API credentials.
api_surface: REST broad (plus SOAP, Bulk, many specialized APIs)

name: HubSpot
one_line: Inbound CRM, marketing, and sales platform with open RESTful APIs.
self_serve_detail: Create a free HubSpot account (no paid plan needed); create an app to get OAuth client ID/secret, or a private app access token (Bearer). Free developer account includes test accounts and API access.

name: Twenty
one_line: Open-source, developer-friendly CRM with GraphQL and REST APIs.
self_serve_detail: Create an API key in workspace Settings -> API & Webhooks (available on free Cloud workspaces); keys are Bearer tokens scoping to roles. No paid plan or approval required for API access.

name: Podio
one_line: Customizable work-management and CRM app platform.
self_serve_detail: Register an app at podio.com/settings/api to get a client ID/secret for OAuth2. The Podio API is free for both free and premium accounts; no paid plan or approval needed. App-authentication (app id/token) and password flows also available.

name: Zoho CRM
one_line: Cloud CRM for sales, marketing, and customer support.
self_serve_detail: Sign up for a free Zoho account; register a client (Self Client) in the Zoho API Console to get a client ID/secret, generate a grant token, and exchange it for OAuth2 access/refresh tokens. No paid plan or approval required.
